acceptance_criteria: Installer V2 check and plan are read-only and report a current 0.12.0 source.
Apply, validate and confirm complete one receipt-bound transaction; any failed validation uses the exact restore procedure.
Codex lists agentic-sdlc-codex-plugin@personal as enabled at version 0.12.0 and the installed CLI doctor and help smoke checks pass.
The staged plugin, marketplace entry and Codex plugin cache agree byte-for-byte with the merged 0.12.0 package.
The before and after SHA-256 hashes of /Users/antonioantenore/AGENTS.md and /Users/antonioantenore/.codex/RTK.md are identical.
Writes remain inside the exact approved plugin staging, marketplace, cache and Codex plugin registration paths; no tag, npm publish or GitHub release occurs.

approvals.summary: Antonio ha autorizzato l'installazione locale completa in autonomia solo dopo il merge, entro i percorsi personali mostrati, con rollback obbligatorio e AGENTS.md e RTK.md invariati.

scope.principle: A human approval applies only to the specific artifact or decision shown to the user before the approval.

constraints: Run only after the 0.12.0 PR head is merged to origin/main and verified.
Installer V2 itself must not modify global Codex guidance or RTK integration.
codex plugin add may update only the personal plugin registration in /Users/antonioantenore/.codex/config.toml.
integrations: Codex personal marketplace and plugin cache
non_functional_requirements: The local release must be reversible until explicit receipt confirmation.
non_goals: Do not publish npm packages, tags or GitHub releases.
summary: Install the merged 0.12.0 plugin through the reversible Installer V2 transaction and register it in Antonio's personal Codex marketplace without changing AGENTS.md or RTK.md.
title: Install and verify Agentic SDLC 0.12.0 locally
